creator: bsd@abinet.ru
text:
Handbook doesn't mention that security/heimdal is optional and when it tells to install the port and invoke a kadmin, actually the base version is invoked.

kadmin from security/heimdal doesn't work as well, init DOMAIN.NAME complains about rc4 instantiation failure and exits.

security/krb5 works, but it far more complex software to setup. It even comes without rc.d scripts for some reason.
